mapper.select: select * from note where deleted=0 order by update_time desc
select * from note where group_id=#{groupId} and deleted=0 order by update_time desc
mapper.insert: insert into note(title, content, group_id, create_time, update_time, deleted) values(#{title}, #{content}, #{groupId}, now(), now(), 0)
mapper.update: update note set title=#{title}, content=#{content}, update_time=now() where id=#{id}
update note set deleted=1, delete_time=now() where id=#{id}
mapper.select: select * from note where deleted=1 order by delete_time desc
mapper.update: update note set deleted=0, delete_time=null where id=#{id}
mapper.select: select * from note where deleted=0 and (title like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or content like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%')) order by update_time desc
mapper.update: update note set group_id=#{groupId}, update_time=now() where id=#{id}
